title: Revavroom Starmobiles
description: A Cobblemon Addon that adds cosmetics for Revavroom.
body:
## **PLEASE NOTE**

The Model of the Starmobile was not created by me, I only textured it. The person who created it was: _Surebett_.

**In oder for this addon to work it needs to be in the world's datapack folder and as an active resource pack**

For now the pack only holds the base Starmobiles from scarlet and violet.
In the future i might make them for more typings or just different type of cars in general.


```
Segin: Dark gem
Schedar: Fire gem
Ruchbah: Fairy gem
Navi: Poison gem
Caph: Fighting gem
```
